title: Lightning Background
description: Raw WebGL GLSL FBM lightning shader that renders branching electric bolts continuously across the viewport. Purely static — no user interaction required.
prompt_text:
# Lightning Background

Raw WebGL GLSL FBM lightning shader that renders branching electric bolts continuously across the viewport. Purely static — no user interaction required.

## Use when
- Setting a dramatic electric atmosphere on a dark landing page or hero section.
- Creating a high-voltage 404 page or error screen background.
- Adding ambient energy to a section without any cursor dependency.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: none (raw WebGL)

## Install
```bash
none
```

## Component — lightning-background.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_010.md
// Export: Lightning (default)
// Props: hue (number), xOffset (number), speed (number), intensity (number), size (number), className
// Uses raw WebGL context with custom GLSL FBM lightning fragment shader
// No external libraries — only native browser WebGL
// See full source in raw/animations_010.md
```

## Notes
- No external dependencies but uses raw WebGL — complexity is `heavy` due to custom GLSL shader.
- Relies on `OES_standard_derivatives` extension for anti-aliasing.
